notes: DES-001 through DES-056 all completed (moved to done/ folder)
DES-047 through DES-056 were fixed in cycle 5 commits (git log confirms)
DES-048 fix was PARTIAL — 6 bar element instances remain (covered by DES-059)
DES-057 through DES-066 are open tickets from cycle 6
Cycle 6 theme: DEEP INLINE STYLE SWEEP — lab.js (27 radius), 66 HTML pages (~300 radius), canvas hardcoded hex, gradients
Sub-minimum border-radius is still the dominant issue: ~330 instances across JS + HTML pages remaining after CSS fixes
Canvas code has a systemic hardcoded hex problem: lab.js (14+ posColors copies), league-intel.html (6 canvas hex), lab.js verdict colors
Two gradient violations found: prompts.html (text fade) and lab.html (sparkline placeholder striped pattern)
formula-store.js is 98% design-compliant — only the publish modal info box radius:6px is off
Good disciplines STILL holding: zero rogue fonts, zero 'Loading...' text, zero cold grays, zero blue-black ink
All box-shadow:6px instances on hover states are CORRECT per design guide — no new at-rest violations found
lab.js has an orphaned gold color (#c5a000) that doesn't match any design token — should be --yellow (#ffc857)
